name: meteoric shard
identity: A rare, celestial fragment of metal formed from meteoric iron, revered by the tribe for its ceremonial and symbolic value. It is a scarce resource, used to craft ceremonial objects but not commonly available for general crafting.
current_status: Revered as a ceremonial material by the tribe, though its scarcity limits its use beyond special rituals.

description.value: A rare, celestial fragment of metal formed from meteoric iron, used in ceremonial contexts by the tribe.

volatile_state.current_activity: Used in ceremonial rituals by the tribe
volatile_state.condition: Preserved as a rare and sacred material

notes: Exact location and usage context not explicitly stated, inferred from tribal reliance on natural materials and the shard's ceremonial role.
